text: Which band performed the hit song 'Bohemian Rhapsody'?
explanation: Queen released 'Bohemian Rhapsody' in 1975, with Freddie Mercury on lead vocals.

text: What year was the first iPhone released?
explanation: Steve Jobs unveiled the first iPhone on January 9, 2007.

text: Michael Jackson was known as the 'King of Pop'.
explanation: Michael Jackson earned the title through his unprecedented success in music, dance, and entertainment.

text: Who played Jack in the 1997 film 'Titanic'?
explanation: Leonardo DiCaprio played Jack Dawson opposite Kate Winslet's Rose.

text: What is the name of the coffee shop in the TV show 'Friends'?
explanation: Central Perk was the main hangout spot for the six friends throughout the series.
Van Gogh painted 'The Starry Night' in 1889 while at an asylum in Saint-Remy-de-Provence.

text: The TV series 'Breaking Bad' is set in New Mexico.
explanation: Breaking Bad was set and filmed in Albuquerque, New Mexico.

text: What was the first Disney animated feature film?
optionTexts: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
explanation: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs was released in 1937 as Disney's first animated feature.

text: Who sang the theme song for the James Bond film 'Goldfinger'?
explanation: Shirley Bassey performed the iconic 'Goldfinger' theme in 1964.

text: What is the name of Harry Potter's pet owl?
explanation: Hedwig was Harry's loyal snowy owl, given to him by Hagrid.

text: Which actor played the Joker in 'The Dark Knight' (2008)?
explanation: Heath Ledger won a posthumous Academy Award for his portrayal of the Joker.

text: The band ABBA was from Sweden.
explanation: ABBA was formed in Stockholm, Sweden in 1972.

text: What is the highest-grossing film of all time (not adjusted for inflation)?
explanation: Avatar (2009) holds the record at over $2.9 billion worldwide.

text: Who wrote the novel 'To Kill a Mockingbird'?
explanation: Harper Lee published 'To Kill a Mockingbird' in 1960.

text: Elvis Presley had a twin brother who died at birth.
explanation: Elvis's twin brother, Jesse Garon Presley, was stillborn on January 8, 1935.
